allowed: single rectangular quad Stokes screening fixtures
velocity, pressure, divergence, Reynolds, and dissipation regression checks
not_allowed: mesh-convergence claims beyond the retained linear-field screening fixture
geometry families outside the compact rectangular screening patch

applies_to: closed arithmetic comparison between stored element divergence_error and recomputed fixture divergence
result max_divergence_error equality for the same compact fixture
divergence_regression_tolerance.rationale: The current Stokes screening fixtures compute divergence directly from the same compact quad arithmetic path. The 1e-10 gate catches implementation drift without implying incompressible CFD convergence.

boundary_response_status.rationale: The lid-driven shear boundary response adds review coverage, but it is still a compact regression fixture rather than validation evidence.

promotion_rule: The Stokes screening boundary may be promoted only with retained mesh-convergence or reference-tool evidence and must remain explicitly non-Navier-Stokes.
remaining_gate: Any future industrial CFD, transient, turbulence, or compressible-flow claim needs separate convergence or external-reference evidence.
